title: sapium aucuparium var. stenophyllum
intro: Sapium aucuparium var. stenophyllum, also known as the Chinese staff tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal medicine, Sapium aucuparium var. stenophyllum is often prepared as a decoction or an infusion to be used as a treatment for various ailments.
